CREATE TABLE ChemistryElements (AtomicNumber INT PRIMARY KEY, Symbol VARCHAR(2), Name VARCHAR(50), Mass DECIMAL(10, 2), MeltingPoint DECIMAL(10, 2), BoilingPoint DECIMAL(10, 2), FoundYear INT);
INSERT INTO ChemistryElements (AtomicNumber, Symbol, Name, Mass, MeltingPoint, BoilingPoint, FoundYear) VALUES (28, 'Ni', 'Nickel', 58.69, 1726.0, 3005.0, 1751);
CREATE TABLE WSDLService (ServiceID INT PRIMARY KEY, ServiceName VARCHAR(100), WSDLURL VARCHAR(200));
INSERT INTO WSDLService (ServiceID, ServiceName, WSDLURL) VALUES (1, 'ChemistryService', 'http://example.com/chemistry.wsdl');
SELECT xml_tree_doc(Chemistry.getElementBySymbol('Ni')) AS ElementInfo FROM ChemistryElements WHERE AtomicNumber = (SELECT AtomicNumber FROM ChemistryElements WHERE Symbol = 'Ni');
SELECT * FROM WSDLService WHERE ServiceName IN (SELECT DISTINCT ServiceName FROM WSDLService WHERE ServiceID < 5);
CREATE TABLE SOAPOperations (OperationID INT PRIMARY KEY, OperationName VARCHAR(100), ServiceID INT, FOREIGN KEY (ServiceID) REFERENCES WSDLService(ServiceID));
INSERT INTO SOAPOperations (OperationID, OperationName, ServiceID) VALUES (1, 'getElementBySymbol', 1);
SELECT xml_tree_doc(Chemistry.getElementBySymbol('He')) FROM WSDLService WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SOAPOperations WHERE OperationName = 'getElementBySymbol' AND ServiceID = WSDLService.ServiceID);
CREATE TABLE TestResults (TestID INT PRIMARY KEY, Result VARCHAR(250), Timestamp DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO TestResults (TestID, Result) VALUES (1, 'Imported WSDL successfully and generated PL wrappers.');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TestResults WHERE Timestamp > (SELECT MAX(Timestamp) FROM TestResults) - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
SELECT xml_tree_doc(Chemistry.getElementBySymbol('Xe')) WHERE Symbol IN (SELECT Symbol FROM ChemistryElements WHERE Mass > 100);
DELETE FROM WSDLService WHERE ServiceID = 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SOAPOperations WHERE ServiceID = WSDLService.ServiceID);
